title: sorghum lithophilum
intro: Sorghum lithophilum, also known as Lithospermum erythrorhizon, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorghum lithophilum include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of cancer, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
